description: Implement the diffless read verbs (doctor already done, bl-d024): show/list/ready/dep-tree. Walk tasks/, parse Task (bl-7b8f/bl-651c), compute the §3 derived status ladder (Task::status with the store's is_resolved) and §10 ready/closeable predicates (bl-70f5, delivered); render BOTH human output (status glyphs/colors; --plain/NO_COLOR for stable ASCII) and --json (the supported machine contract). 'bl ready' ORDERS the ready set by priority asc (absent LAST) then created asc (§10) — ordering is display-only, never in the predicate. TIMESTAMP DISPLAY: storage is i64 unix-time, so this layer is the SOLE place that renders unix→ISO-8601 (§9) — hand-roll civil-from-days (~40 lines, no chrono dep) or one small display-only dep. No seal, no change worktree: the printed output is the whole contribution (§9). Reuses the CLI arg-parse surface from the dispatch ball (bl-35f7).
title: §9 read verbs: show/list/ready/dep-tree + rendering (status ladder, ISO-8601, --json)
